Definition: species name as printed in Frahm & Zilles 1994
Note: journal names kept (e.g. Lemur albifrons; Cebuella pygmaea; Cercocebus albigena; Colobus badius); taxonomy applied later via ../_keys/Stephan/
Table 1 col 1; re-used (Insectivora from Stephan et al. 1991; Primates from Stephan et al. 1981)

Definition: total hippocampus volume in mm3 (= retrocommissural + HP/HS fibres)
Note: Table 1 'Hippocampus total'; from Stephan et al. 1981/1988 (same serial sections)

Definition: volume of pre- (HP) + supra-commissural (HS) hippocampus plus hippocampal fibres (mainly fimbria/fornix), in mm3
Note: Table 1 'HP + HS + fibers'; = total hippocampus - retrocommissural (not measured directly)

Definition: volume of the retrocommissural hippocampus in mm3 (= sum of the six retrohippocampal subfields)
Note: Table 1 'Hippocampus retrocommissuralis'; sum of Table 2 subfields

Definition: volume of the subiculum in mm3
volume of hippocampal field CA1 in mm3
volume of hippocampal field CA2 in mm3
volume of hippocampal field CA3 in mm3 (CA4 cells of the hilus measured with the hilus region)
volume of the hilus region of the fascia dentata in mm3 (includes CA4)
volume of the fascia dentata (dentate gyrus) in mm3

Total hippocampus = retrocommissural hippocampus + HP/HS fibres. Retrocommissural = subiculum + CA1 + CA2 + CA3 + hilus + fascia dentata. The paper also reports allometric size indices (vs body weight) for each region; those are derived and recomputed downstream (not snapshotted).
Note: Volumes in mm3. 48 species (4 Insectivora + 44 primates) in printed taxonomic order.
